port.title: Gateway's service port
port.description: Provide the port used for OpenWebNet communication with the {name} gateway {host}

password.title: Gateway's password

custom.title: Manual gateway entry
custom.description: Enter the gateway IP address and port. The MAC address and model will be auto-discovered.

custom_manual.description: Could not auto-discover the gateway at {host}:{port}. Please enter the MAC address and model manually.

error.password_retry: Gateway refusing password negotiation, wait 60s before retrying.

abort.all_configured: All MyHome gateways are already configured

data.generate_events: Generate events in Home Assistant for each message received
data.decoder_1_pre_gain: Decoder 1 — Pre-gain offset % (0 = Cambridge with Pre-Amp OFF, 20 = squeezelite)
